title: Create HistorialPrecioProducto model and DB relations
exit_criteria: Model is created, synced with SQLite, and belongsTo Producto.

title: Implement /api/productos and /api/categorias-producto CRUD
exit_criteria: Endpoints for GET, POST, PUT, DELETE work. PUT handles price history insertion.

title: Implement /api/productos/stats for KPIs
exit_criteria: Returns total, active, total categories, and the most requested service in the current month.

title: Create frontend data hooks
exit_criteria: Hooks can fetch products, stats, and manage modal states via zustand/useState.

title: Build page structure, header and KPIs
exit_criteria: Page loads with layout similar to pedidos. KPIs display data from backend.

title: Build GSAP animated data table
exit_criteria: Table renders rows that fade in. Shows all columns including Usage (Month).

title: Build forms and modals
exit_criteria: Modals use react-hook-form and zod for strictly validated creation and editing. History modal shows past prices.
